creator: hartzell@alerce.com
text:
I replaced /boot/loader.efi on the memstick image that I built after you committed the other patches with the loader.efi from this bug report.

I powered up, held down the option key, selected that device to boot from, and immediately hit the space bar.

It loaded /boot/kernel/kernel and then gave me the `OK` prompt.

gop does not appear to work, it fails with:

    gop: Graphics Output Protocol not present (error=14)

I've attached a photo.
